creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
stephen     2011-07-19 03:45:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/createrepo  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - New port sysutils/createrepo.
  
  This utility will generate a common metadata repository from a directory of
  rpm packages.
  
  WWW: http://createrepo.baseurl.org/
  
  PR:             ports/150542
  Submitted by:   afb@rpm5.org
  Approved by:    maho (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1306    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/sysutils/createrepo/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/createrepo/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/createrepo/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/sysutils/createrepo/pkg-plist (new)
